pm.description: Project manager agent that breaks down user stories, tasks subagents, coordinates work between the coding-agent and test-engineer-agent, and ensures code quality before commits.

coding-agent.description: Coding agent responsible for implementing features, fixing bugs, and writing code as tasked by the PM agent. Does not commit code without test-engineer sign-off.

test-engineer-agent.description: Test engineer agent responsible for reviewing all code changes, running tests, providing sign-off or feedback. No changes are committed without this agent's approval.
